QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_19

question.text: Under the Auto Choice LC-75 (Aggressive) lifecycle fund, what is the equity allocation up to age 35?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** In LC-75 (Aggressive), equity allocation starts at 75% and remains at 75% until age 35, then gradually reduces to 15% by age 55+. **The Trap:** Candidates may confuse LC-75 equity levels with Active Choice max equity (also 75%). LC-75 refers to the starting equity percentage. **Cross-Exam Context:** LC-25 starts at 25% equity, LC-50 at 50%, LC-75 at 75%. All reduce equity with age. Rebalancing happens on the subscriber birthday. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Recommend LC-75 for younger clients with high risk appetite, LC-50 as the balanced default, and LC-25 for conservative investors.
